integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/kernel/product_screenshot_capture.rs:767-769 sets classification=Low, exportable=false, retention_class='visual-validation'; tests/native_screenshot_capture_tests.rs:119-208 proves focus-unsafe rejection and no-artifact-on-reject. Contract also names redaction + cleanup; those aspects are not exercised by any test (retention TTL is None, no redaction/cleanup path proven). Non-blocking: real ArtifactStore touch present, but proof partial.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
